acceptance_targets: [chapter_15_F001] PASS if the revised passage between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:91 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:118 includes (a) one on-page embodied grief action by Marisol after time-of-death and (b) one concrete craving-or-shock collision before the consult-room setup; FAIL if the text still moves from death pronouncement straight into legal logistics without those rendered beats.

[chapter_15_F002] PASS if a reader can point to one explicit trigger action and one explicit deliberate response by Ada before the packet handoff at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:269; FAIL if the decision remains primarily reported in summary dialogue.

[chapter_15_F003] PASS if revised exchanges between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:131 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:170 plus between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:229 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:256 show at least one line per speaker that is unmistakably character-specific in register, and no two consecutive turns are pure legal-information delivery without leverage shift; FAIL otherwise.

[chapter_15_F004] PASS if the cited spans contain no more than two explicit gaze-transition constructions after revision and each replacement beat adds a concrete non-visual cue linked to stakes; FAIL if three or more gaze-transition defaults remain in those same spans.

[chapter_15_F005] PASS if the revised consult exchange between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:131 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:177 and the library exchange between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:207 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:233 contain no run of 10 consecutive paragraphs without at least one Marisol interior beat (thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment); FAIL if any such 10+ paragraph run remains.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passage between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:91 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:118 includes (a) one on-page embodied grief action by Marisol after time-of-death and (b) one concrete craving-or-shock collision before the consult-room setup; FAIL if the text still moves from death pronouncement straight into legal logistics without those rendered beats.
findings.problem: Sanitization/timidity drift in the immediate death aftermath: the narrative pivots from Salvador's final breath to document validity and estate logistics before fully rendering Marisol's embodied grief in-scene. The procedural handoff displaces emotional and physical consequence at the exact pressure point.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the post-death corridor turn around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:91, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:99, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:109, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:118 so the chapter holds on Marisol's body-level response (breath, motor control, sensory distortion, contact with the room/body) before the Malcolm call. Keep legal escalation, but delay it until after at least one concrete grief beat that cannot be paraphrased as paperwork.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if a reader can point to one explicit trigger action and one explicit deliberate response by Ada before the packet handoff at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:269; FAIL if the decision remains primarily reported in summary dialogue.
findings.problem: A core hinge choice (Ada's leak decision) is delivered mostly as retrospective explanation ("I made a decision this afternoon") rather than dramatized causal action. That weakens the chapter's cause-and-effect force at a major consequence turn.
findings.rewrite_direction: Strengthen causal storytelling around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:223, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:229, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:237, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:251, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:269 by adding a brief on-page trigger/countermove sequence (for example: the specific legal/administrative directive Ada receives, her immediate refusal calculus, and the operational choice that leads to the packet handoff).

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised exchanges between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:131 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:170 plus between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:229 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:256 show at least one line per speaker that is unmistakably character-specific in register, and no two consecutive turns are pure legal-information delivery without leverage shift; FAIL otherwise.
findings.problem: High-pressure exchanges drift into extended institutional/legal exposition, and Marisol/Ada frequently share the same procedural diction and sentence posture. Idiolect separation softens in moments that should sound most pressure-specific.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten and differentiate turns around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:131, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:147, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:165, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:229, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:237, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:255. Keep Malcolm formally legal, but let Marisol return to her image-driven stress register and high-contraction pressure speech; keep Ada technical but sharper and less essay-like, with interruptions and tactical brevity under risk.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the cited spans contain no more than two explicit gaze-transition constructions after revision and each replacement beat adds a concrete non-visual cue linked to stakes; FAIL if three or more gaze-transition defaults remain in those same spans.
findings.problem: A recurring gaze-transition construction ("looked at/looked up") appears well over twice and functions as a default beat connector. The repetition becomes a prose tic that flattens scene motion and sensory variety.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the repeated gaze beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:5, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:13, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:89, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:95, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:187, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:271, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:289, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:313. Replace at least half with non-visual action/sensation beats tied to pressure (touch, sound, spatial movement, bodily stress response).

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised consult exchange between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:131 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:177 and the library exchange between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:207 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:233 contain no run of 10 consecutive paragraphs without at least one Marisol interior beat (thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment); FAIL if any such 10+ paragraph run remains.
findings.problem: Interiority dropouts: there are 10+ paragraph runs in key exchanges where Marisol has little or no direct internal experience (thought/sensation/self-assessment), making sections read like screenplay transcript rather than close-third prose.
findings.rewrite_direction: Inject interior anchors into the long dialogue corridors around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:131, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:147, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:165, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:177, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:207, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:221, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:233. Use brief thought/sensation/self-judgment beats at pressure turns (before/after legal threats, before packet transfer) without breaking scene momentum.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When choosing between reputationally safe abstraction and specific discomfort, choose specificity. Render addiction, sexuality, deceit, class shame, and grief at lived scale. In edge cases, preserve character truth and causal accountability over reader comfort or institutional decorum.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene demands bodily, moral, or economic specificity, euphemistic phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with concrete stakes and observable consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; full forms appear only for emphasis, ritual language, or character-specific formal posture

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density and pressure modes: pair high-conflict chapters with quiet domestic or documentary chapters, vary dialogue-to-interiority ratios, and prevent identical chapter skeletons in consecutive sequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: contemporary literary diction with class-aware, borough-specific concreteness; avoid prestige-neutral workshop language
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Marisol, with rare brief distance expansions for institutional scenes
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternating tensile compression and reflective extension; line-level cadence should carry emotional pressure, not just information
